style_prefix: pixel art game sprite, clean silhouette, neon synthwave post-apocalyptic sci-fi, limited palette of deep violet/indigo with magenta/cyan/yellow accents, no background (transparent or pure black), Chrono Trigger meets Hyper Light Drifter

sprites.name: kaida_overworld
sprites.prompt: pixel art overworld sprite, young woman warrior with short magenta hair sweep, pulse-blade on back, cyan jacket + dark leggings, tiny 3/4 top-down view, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: vex_overworld
sprites.prompt: pixel art overworld sprite, tall hooded mystic in dark cloak with cyan chrono-glyphs glowing on hem, chrono-staff, 3/4 top-down view

sprites.name: rune_overworld
sprites.prompt: pixel art overworld sprite, stocky engineer with yellow goggles and antenna, forge-hammer at hip, drone on shoulder, mustard-yellow rig, 3/4 top-down view
